evidences.content: Game Mode defines the rules and mechanics of your game in Unreal Engine.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Game Mode Blueprint controls: Default Pawn, HUD, Player Controller, and Game State.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Create a Game Mode Blueprint by right-clicking in Content Browser.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: The Game Mode works with Game State to track multiplayer game progress.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Set your Game Mode in Project Settings or per-level in World Settings.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Game Mode only exists on the server in multiplayer. Clients get Game State.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: To test, set the Default Pawn class to your custom character blueprint.
evidences.speaker: instructor

evidences.content: Understanding Game Mode is essential before building game mechanics.
evidences.speaker: instructor
